@UpscRepublicX Option B 
Location: The SUMED pipeline (also known as the Suez-Mediterranean pipeline) is located entirely within Egypt. It runs from the terminal at Ain Sokhna on the Gulf of Suez (Red Sea) to the Sidi Kerir terminal on the Mediterranean Sea, near Alexandria.
items.author: aarikaup

items.text:
(b) Egypt

🇪🇬 Location: The SUMED pipeline (Suez–Mediterranean Pipeline) is an oil pipeline located entirely within Egypt.
📍 Route: It runs for 320 km (200 miles) from the Ain Sokhna terminal on the Gulf of Suez (Red Sea) to the Sidi Kerir port near Alexandria (Mediterranean Sea)
